title: Backend Opening Checklist
content: Use Jungle House WiFi or NFC to clock in. This applies to full timer and registered part timer only.

title: Backend Opening Checklist
content: Wear apron, mask, and uniform. Must follow the company Dress Code Standard.

title: Backend Opening Checklist
content: Check the shelf behind the booth. See if anything is low in stock and write it down. Minimum amounts: 4-bottle juice box 20, 8-bottle juice box 10, Daily Muji Box 20, Small paper bag 30, Big paper bag 20.

title: Backend Opening Checklist
content: Open the booth cabinet. Check what needs to be refilled and write it down: Daily Honey Series, Premium Honey Series, Infused Honey Series, Wooden stirrer, and Honey Gift Set.

title: Backend Opening Checklist
content: Take the Spring Warehouse key from the booth cabinet at the front top-right corner. It is the key with number 10.

title: Backend Opening Checklist
content: Check the fridge in front of the booth and record what honey juice is missing. Minimum amounts: Royal White 15 bottles, Yellow Love 15 bottles, Royal Black 5 bottles, Jungle Heart 15 bottles, Citrus Bloom 10 bottles, Jungle Eye 10 bottles, Sweet Tooth 10 bottles, Roast Cube 5 bottles. Make sure to meet these quantities and do not make too many extras.

title: Backend Opening Checklist
content: Take the key and go to Spring Warehouse. Unlock it. Spring Warehouse is just to the right of John Pie.

title: Closing Spring Warehouse
content: Measure the NR of each jerry can honey. Just measure the honey in the circle area.

title: Closing Spring Warehouse
content: Record it in the stock count link below.

title: Closing Spring Warehouse
content: Things that need to be recorded in the link: drinking water (full jerry can), juice bottle box (full box), and juice bottle cap (full bag).

title: Closing Spring Warehouse
content: Wash the jug and stirrer used to make juice and wipe them using kitchen towels or tissue provided.

title: Closing Spring Warehouse
content: Close the jug properly with kitchen towel on top and use a rubber band to secure it tightly.

title: Closing Spring Warehouse
content: Place the jug beside the drinking water.

title: Closing Spring Warehouse
content: Wash the grey water bucket and both cloths.

title: Closing Spring Warehouse
content: Soak both cloths with water inside the white basket.

title: Closing Spring Warehouse
content: Wipe the grey water bucket using kitchen towels or tissue provided.

title: Closing Spring Warehouse
content: Place the weighing scale according to the picture.

title: Closing Spring Warehouse
content: Change a new rubbish plastic bag for the dustbin.

title: Ice Bin Daily Closing Checklist

title: Ice Bin Daily Closing Checklist
content: Spot and clean. Check the inside and outside for any stains, sticky spots, or dirt. If you see a spot, wipe it clean immediately.

title: Ice Bin Daily Closing Checklist
content: Park it. Move the ice bin to its designated spot beside the storeroom back door so the vendor can complete the refill easily tomorrow.

title: Kiosk Closing Check List
content: Count NR by first measuring all NR in the first layer with black tie, then add the full NR together with the measured NR in black tie. Refer to the NR record. Example: if CB (6000) has two full jerry cans, calculate 6000 x 2 = 12000, then add the CB jerry can with black tie. Review the Jerry Can Stocktake Guide if needed.
